Document:
[color=#ffff00][head=3]Section 3: Metagaming Rules[/head][/color]
[color=#a4885c]3.1[/color] Use the chat channels for their intended purposes. *1
[color=#a4885c]3.2[/color] Characters do not retain any knowledge of what happened while they were dead. *1
[color=#a4885c]3.3[/color] Do not use any information gained by meta-communication. *1
[color=#a4885c]3.3A[/color] Meta-Communication is permitted so long as its ONLY about PvE content any other content should NOT be said unless its though In-game chats
[color=#a4885c]3.4[/color] Discussion about the current around is allowed on the Triad Discord server however acting on information gained though this method is considered metagaming regardless of the information
[color=#a4885c]3.5[/color] Do not meta-grudge or meta-friend. (Using in or out of character information to give unfair treatment or advantages to others.) *1
[color=#a4885c]3.6[/color] Do NOT antag-roll. (Intentionally ghosting or cryoing to look for antag roles.)*1
